// Signal that dependencies are loading window.dependenciesLoading = true; try { const { IbiraAPIFetchManager } = await import('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/mpbarbosa/ibira.js@0.2.2-alpha/src/index.js'); window.IbiraAPIFetchManager = IbiraAPIFetchManager; console.log('✓ IbiraAPIFetchManager loaded successfully from CDN'); } catch (error) { console.warn('⚠️ Failed to load IbiraAPIFetchManager from CDN:', error.message); console.log('✓ Application will use fallback fetch implementation'); // App will use fallback - guia.js has IbiraAPIFetchManagerFallback } finally { // Signal that dependencies are ready window.dependenciesLoading = false; window.dispatchEvent(new Event('dependencies-ready')); }
